hero.baseline: Relive the moment as you truly lived it.

signature.title: The SOREL Signature
signature.subtitle: You are not booking a photographer. You are booking a house.
signature.p1: SOREL is a photo & film house, not a freelancer. Every engagement is guided by a unique artistic direction, constant rigor, and an exceptional perspective.
signature.p2: Regardless of which talent is assigned, the SOREL signature guarantees total visual consistency. Same style, same precision, same emotion.
signature.p3: We recreate the moment as you truly lived it. Not as a reconstruction. As a living memory.

services.subtitle: Photo, film or both — every SOREL engagement is crafted for excellence.

signaturePage.title: The SOREL Signature
signaturePage.subtitle: A house, a standard, a vision.
signaturePage.s1Body: SOREL is not a freelancer or a conventional agency. We are a photo & film house with its own artistic direction, precise quality standards, and a culture of excellence.
signaturePage.s2Body: Regardless of which talent covers your event, the SOREL signature is present. Same aesthetic, same precision, same output. You are booking a house, not an individual.
signaturePage.s3Body: Our obsession: recreate the moment as you truly lived it. Not a staged reconstruction, but a living memory, faithful to the real sensation of the moment.
signaturePage.s4Body: Every image, every shot is intentional. Nothing is left to chance. SOREL marries formal elegance with the natural energy of the moment.
